title: Marie’s Priorities To You
meta_description: I'm working hard to enable local people to fulfil their potential.
headings: h3: Roles I hold as your MP
text_excerpt: Marie’s Priorities To You Skip to content Home About Marie News Priorities Get in touch > Newsletter Toggle menu Marie Tidball MP My priorities to you As your Member of Parliament, I am working hard to give back to the place that nurtured me growing up, to enable local people to fulfil their potential. Tackling the Cost of Living Tackling poor water quality and water bosses' bonuses Good quality, affordable housing NHS Fit for the Future Improving community healthcare Access to NHS dentistry Improving the safety of maternity care for disabled women Securing Safer Communities Putting thousands more neighbourhood police and PSCOs back on the beat Tackling rural crime Removing the presumption of contact in family courts Improving local flooding prevention and extreme weather response Forging Thriving Towns and High Streets Securing the future of Stocksbridge Speciality Steels Supporting small businesses Championing local banking Connecting Our Communities Bringing buses back into public control Upgrading the Penistone Line Securing a tram train extension to Stocksbridge, via Oughtibridge, Wharncliffe Side, and Deepcar Improving and creating safe active travel Breaking Down Barriers to Opportunity Improving SEND education Supporting local skills pathways Roles I hold as your MP Co-Chair, Stocksbridge Towns Fund Board Co-Chair, Disability Parliamentary Labour Party Chair, Members Accessibility Group Parliamentary Private Secretary (PPS) to the Department for Business and Trade Promoted by and on behalf of Marie Tidball at P&S Labour, P.O. Box 825, Barnsley, S73 3DU Privacy Policy Subscribe to receive updates and news directly to your inbox. Marie on Social Media Facebook Twitter Instagram TikTok YouTube
